caption: A man sits in a studio against a dark, textured sound-absorbing wall. He wears a grey baseball cap with a red and white logo, black over-ear headphones, and a grey t-shirt with a large, dark letter "L" on the chest. A large tattoo is visible on his right forearm. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features a "Blue" brand logo on the shock mount. The man is speaking into the microphone, and his expression remains relatively neutral as he talks. Between the frames, his facial movements shift slightly as he speaks, and in the final sequence, he begins to move his right arm and hand outward in a gesturing motion. The lighting is soft and focused on the man, keeping the background dark and consistent throughout the clip.
